meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to build a high-impact portfolio. Overcome the 'no experience' barrier with advanced AI-assisted engineering.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'no portfolio' barrier, you must move beyond generic tutorials. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you can rapidly prototype production-grade features. This setup allows you to focus on high-level architecture and complex logic, transforming your workflow into a professional-grade engine that proves your engineering capability to employers.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a new repository is the great filter of our industry. You have the theoretical knowledge, but employers don't want to see a list of completed courses—they want to see the scars of production-level engineering. The gap between a student project and a career-defining application isn't talent; it’s the velocity at which you can translate intent into architectural reality.

We are moving past the era of manual boilerplate. By mastering Claude Code in tandem with Antigravity, you stop being a student who follows tutorials and start being an AI-augmented architect. This guide will show you how to set up an environment that generates high-fidelity code, allowing you to build complex, scalable SaaS features in hours, not weeks.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Configure your workspace to handle agentic workflows. We need a clean, modular structure that Claude Code can parse effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a modular TypeScript project structure with clean architecture, including a /src/services and /src/core folder. Ensure strict ESLint and Prettier configs.

steps.title: Architecting the Core Logic
steps.description: Don't just write code; define the system contracts. Use Antigravity to generate type-safe interfaces that serve as the backbone of your application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a robust interface for a multi-tenant SaaS authentication system including JWT handling and role-based access control.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the auth service using the generated interfaces'

steps.title: Accelerating Feature Delivery
steps.description: Inject complex functionality using Claude Code. Focus on integrating external APIs to prove your ability to work with real-world infrastructure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a middleware layer that integrates Stripe for subscription management, including webhook handling and error logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Stripe integration with error handling'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suites
steps.description: A portfolio project is useless without tests. Use AI to generate comprehensive unit and integration tests that demonstrate professionalism.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test coverage for all services in /src/services with 90% threshold for branch coverage.

steps.title: Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Wrap your project with professional documentation. Employers judge your code by the quality of your README.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional README.md including architecture diagrams, setup instructions, and a feature matrix.

pro_tips: Always commit your work in atomic, feature-focused chunks to show a clean git history to recruiters.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to maintain consistent naming conventions across your entire codebase.
Focus on 'Hard Problems' like concurrency or caching; these distinguish a junior dev from an engineer.
Before running a command, use Antigravity to perform a 'system impact analysis' to avoid dependency bloat.
Document your failures in the README; showing how you solved a production bug is more impressive than a perfect project.
content.next_steps: Once your project is deployed, open-source the core modules on GitHub and write a 'Post-Mortem' blog post detailing the technical challenges you overcame. Link this to your resume.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical setup to build projects that stand out in a sea of generic bootcamp clones. Stop waiting for permission to be a professional. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
